_comment: The Next.js frontend uses output:'export' (static HTML/CSS/JS). It is NOT deployed as a standalone Railway service. Instead, `npm run build` runs during the root nixpacks build (see nixpacks.toml phases.frontend), which writes static files to ../web/. The Rust backend (actix-files) then serves them. This file is kept for reference only — do NOT link it as a Railway service.
